title: SPARTA Crypto-D1 Baseline Backtest Plan v1
research_objective: Define EXACTLY what the FIRST future Crypto-D1 backtest runner must test, how results must be reported, and what PASS / WATCH / FAIL gates apply -- BEFORE any backtest is allowed to run. This bundle is a plan / pre-registration only. It does not fetch data, does not connect to any exchange, does not produce any historical result, does not authorize trading or backtest execution.

target_assets.label: Bitcoin
target_assets.rationale: Highest-liquidity, deepest historical record; primary trend benchmark.

target_assets.label: Solana
target_assets.rationale: Different vol / drawdown profile; prevents BTC-only overfit.

timeframe.bar_close_convention: UTC 00:00:00 close; left-closed / right-open documented per dataset manifest.

required_dataset_gate.dataset_exists_on_disk: A specific per-dataset folder under data/crypto_d1_research/<dataset_id>/<dataset_version>/ MUST exist before any backtest may run.
required_dataset_gate.dataset_manifest_exists: manifest.json MUST be present and pass tools/crypto_d1_dataset_manifest_check.py (extended for per-dataset use).
required_dataset_gate.qa_freeze_report_exists: qa_report.json MUST be present and emitted by the future QA harness specified in Bundle 14.
required_dataset_gate.qa_status_pass_or_approved_warn: manifest.QA_status MUST be 'QA_PASS' OR ('QA_WARN' with an explicit operator-acceptance note attached).
required_dataset_gate.no_lookahead_qa_check_passed: QA harness's no_lookahead check MUST be among the 'checks_passed' list of the cited qa_report.json.
required_dataset_gate.duplicate_missing_timestamp_checks_passe: QA groups B / D / E / G's blocking checks MUST be among 'checks_passed'.

baseline_strategy_families.label: A. Buy-and-hold benchmark
baseline_strategy_families.purpose: Compare every active strategy against passive exposure. NOT a strategy candidate; benchmark only.
baseline_strategy_families.shape: Long-only spot. Test BTC, ETH, SOL separately AND an equal-weight rebalanced basket (rebalanced monthly per the plan).

baseline_strategy_families.label: B. Donchian / channel breakout
baseline_strategy_families.purpose: Trend-following entry on a daily-bar high breakout.
baseline_strategy_families.shape: Entry: close > N-day rolling high. Exit: close < M-day rolling low OR a trailing-channel exit. Daily close only; no intraday execution.

baseline_strategy_families.label: C. Moving-average trend filter
baseline_strategy_families.purpose: Bias toward risk-on regimes using a long-MA filter.
baseline_strategy_families.shape: Trade trend-following only when close > long-EMA(W). Flat otherwise. Long-only. Daily close only.

baseline_strategy_families.label: D. Momentum continuation
baseline_strategy_families.purpose: Time-series momentum continuation entries on a k-day return signal.
baseline_strategy_families.shape: Long-only. Long if rolling-k-day return > 0 (optional skip-month); exit on signal flip. Daily close only.

baseline_strategy_families.label: E. Volatility-regime gate
baseline_strategy_families.purpose: Filter trend entries during extreme-volatility or low-liquidity regimes. Tested as an ADDITIVE filter on top of (B) / (C) / (D); never standalone.
baseline_strategy_families.shape: Pass entry through only when rolling realised vol of the past V days is within a pre-declared band; otherwise stay flat.

parameters_pre_registered_grid_small.vol_band_pct_threshold: pre-declared per asset before any run

baseline_strategy_families.label: F. Daily mean reversion
baseline_strategy_families.purpose: Optional counter-trend / pullback test. WATCH-only; never primary; must NOT revive any prior failed CODR-* parameter set.
baseline_strategy_families.shape: Pre-registered single-rule reversion test (e.g., entry on N-day pullback below short-MA; exit on snap-back). Long-only. Daily close only.
baseline_strategy_families.history_note: Historical crypto_d* (CODR-1) lines closed under crypto_d7 and crypto_d14 closeout memos. This v1 plan opens a NEW study; it does NOT continue, re-tune, or revive any prior parameter set.

parameter_policy.small_pre_registered_grid_only: Each strategy family carries a small, pre-registered parameter grid (declared in this plan); grids do not grow at runtime.
parameter_policy.parameter_count_budget_per_family: <= 3 free parameters per family at baseline; combinations <= 10 per family.
parameter_policy.all_combinations_logged_rule: Every parameter combination tested MUST appear in the backtest report's 'parameters' field; no silent dropouts.
parameter_policy.chosen_parameter_must_be_explainable: Final reported parameter for any strategy MUST be a member of the pre-registered grid AND have a one-line rationale (e.g., 'median of grid on IS', NOT 'best on OOS').
parameter_policy.baseline_first_complexity_later: No combinations across families until each family has a sealed PASS / WATCH / FAIL verdict on its own.

train_test_policy.train_test_separation_required: IS (in-sample) for any parameter selection; OOS (out-of-sample) sealed before any run.
train_test_policy.single_oos_attempt_per_dataset_version: Re-running OOS after seeing results creates a new dataset_version OR the plan is treated as failed.

IS_OOS_policy.split_definition: IS / OOS windows declared in writing (in this plan or in a separately-authorized addendum) BEFORE any run; window dates pin to the dataset's time_start / time_end via the manifest.
IS_OOS_policy.no_leakage: Features computed at time t MUST use only rows with timestamp <= t; the QA harness's no-lookahead check is the gate.
IS_OOS_policy.regime_acknowledgment: Crypto market regimes (e.g., 2020-2025 framing) MAY be mentioned only as FUTURE planning context; no current data claim is made by this bundle.
IS_OOS_policy.two_thousand_twenty_to_two_thousand_twen: If used, the IS/OOS split MUST avoid a single-bubble-regime IS or OOS unless flagged WATCH.

walk_forward_policy.rolling_or_walk_forward_validation_later: Walk-forward / rolling validation is a separately-authorized step AFTER the static IS/OOS split returns a non-FAIL verdict.

cost_model_requirements.spot_taker_fee_assumption_required: Per venue, dated, pre-declared in the dataset's fees.json before any future run.
cost_model_requirements.default_assumption: TAKER on every leg unless a maker proof is pre-registered.
cost_model_requirements.optional_maker_fee_if_strategy_uses_limi: Recorded only when a future strategy variant pre-registers maker fills; baseline assumes taker / conservative fills.
cost_model_requirements.cost_sensitivity_test_required_before_pa: Fees +/- N bps, slippage +/- M bps; result must survive.

slippage_model_requirements.slippage_assumption_required: Conservative slow-day haircut (constant-bps + one-tick) on top of fees.
slippage_model_requirements.spread_proxy_required_when_quote_data_un: Constant-bps spread proxy declared per asset; conservative.
slippage_model_requirements.depth_aware_slippage_when_l2_available: If L2 quote data is attached, depth-aware slippage replaces the constant-bps proxy.

future_sizing_options: volatility_scaled_sizing (future option; pre-declared with target vol band)
position_sizing_policy.cash_or_risk_off_state_required: When no signal is active, the portfolio sits in cash (no implicit leverage; no short proxy).

risk_model_requirements.drawdown_measurement_required: Daily-bar max drawdown per asset and per basket.
risk_model_requirements.per_asset_drawdown_kill_pre_declared: Per-asset drawdown limit declared before run; breach is a documented kill-switch (logged, not a future trade trigger).
risk_model_requirements.tail_risk_disclosure_required: Each future backtest report includes worst-day / worst-week / worst-month drawdown + at least one named stress scenario.

report_schema.purpose: Defines the SHAPE of every future Crypto-D1 per-strategy backtest report.json. Every field below MUST be populated by any future backtest runner BEFORE the run may be considered 'sealed'.

candidate_registry_update_rules.lane_status_remains_WATCH_until_explicit: Building this plan and even adding the plan docs to extra_files does NOT promote crypto_d1_protocol to ACTIVE; lane stays WATCH.
candidate_registry_update_rules.promotion_to_active_requires_evidence: Promotion to ACTIVE requires a future per-strategy backtest report.json + report.md PASS verdict AND an explicit operator decision; not produced by this bundle.

pass_watch_fail_rules.PASS: Future per-strategy backtest results MUST show ALL of: data was FROZEN + QA_PASS (or approved QA_WARN); no lookahead; full costs (fees + slippage); enough trades (>= 30 per family on OOS, >= 20 per asset); OOS survives the IS pattern in sign + magnitude within a pre-registered tolerance; result does NOT depend on a single asset; drawdown within pre-declared per-asset and portfolio limits; robust to fees +/- N bps and slippage +/- M bps; rules remain simple + explainable; no rule was changed mid-study; AND the strategy meaningfully beats buy-and-hold AFTER costs on a risk-adjusted basis.
pass_watch_fail_rules.WATCH: Promising but at least one of: OOS materially weaker than IS; one asset works, others do not; trade count below the WATCH-floor; sensitive to small fee / slippage changes; high drawdown but possibly improvable; market-regime dependent; or buy-and-hold benchmark beaten only on raw return, not risk-adjusted.
pass_watch_fail_rules.FAIL: No OOS edge; excessive drawdown (above pre-declared kill); overfit parameters (grid edge or post-hoc selection); only works in one bubble regime; edge disappears with realistic costs; insufficient trades; worse than buy-and-hold after risk adjustment; OOS window peeked before sealing; or any safety flag tripped.

kill_conditions: OOS window is peeked before sealing.
Parameter sweep extends beyond the pre-registered grid.
Backtest cannot be reproduced bit-for-bit by a second offline run on the same dataset_version.
An assumption (no-fee, no-slippage, no-borrow, no-funding for spot) is found to have been silently dropped.
Edge depends on data that has been manually edited without documentation + revalidation.
Any safety flag flips to True in the runner.
forbidden_actions: Fetch data from any live exchange API.
Connect SPARTA's runtime to any exchange or vendor over the network.
Execute a backtest from this bundle (this bundle is a PLAN only; the runner is a SEPARATE, separately-authorized bundle).
Run any paper-order or live-trading flow on the basis of any future PASS alone.
Schedule any background daemon or cron job.
Install or read any API key, OAuth token, or .env credential.
Use any synthetic / mock-priced data as evidence.
Revive any prior CODR-* parameter set (mean-reversion lineage) under the v1 plan.
Promote crypto_d1_protocol to ACTIVE / STRONG by this bundle's existence alone.
required_future_artifacts: Crypto-D1 Backtest Runner v1 (P3 / P4 / P5) -- CODE bundle that implements the runner against a FROZEN QA_PASS dataset (separately authorized; recommend using Codex for the next bundle, not Claude, since it will be code-heavy).
Per-strategy backtest report.json + report.md following the report_schema declared here (P3 / P4 OUTPUT; separately authorized).
IS / OOS window addendum -- explicit IS/OOS date ranges pinned to a specific dataset_id+dataset_version; can be folded into the runner bundle or its own preregistration memo.
Crypto-D1 Data Source Evaluation Memo v1 -- written assessment of which offline data sources could later satisfy the QA / freeze spec (memo only, no fetch).
Crypto-D1 Data Acquisition Authorization Draft -- still spec-only; only if the operator wants to start the path toward an actual P2 acquisition.
safety_boundaries: Research-only. Baseline backtest PLAN / pre-registration only.
No broker control, no exchange connection, no API keys, no .env, no credential handling.
No live trading. No paper-order execution. No order placement.
No scheduler / background daemon. No external network calls in this plan's runtime.
No data fetch in this bundle. No backtest execution in this bundle. No dataset processing in this bundle. No real data files or backtest outputs created in this bundle.
Do not modify paper / live execution files.
Do not claim profitability. Do not claim live-readiness. Do not claim STRONG evidence from this plan alone.

This plan does not imply edge. No backtest is run by this bundle. No historical result is produced by this bundle. A future PASS is not trading authorization. No paper/live trading is authorized. No data fetch is authorized. Crypto trend ideas are not profitable until tested with full costs. A good historical chart does not imply future returns. 24/7 session handling; weekday-only filters forbidden.
no_profit_claim_policy: This plan does not imply edge.
No backtest is run by this bundle.
No historical result is produced by this bundle.
A future PASS is not trading authorization.
No paper or live trading is authorized.
Crypto trend ideas are not profitable until tested.
A good historical chart does not imply future returns.
